stride.control_or_reason: author may paste a real customer name; routed to /slo-verify Pass 4 PII scan + Privacy controls row
flag is author-set, /slo-verify cross-checks flag against actual presence of the spec section
tier: public default + Pass 4 PII/telemetry-field scan over docs/biz-public/

stride.component: v4 Measurement Contract section / Contract Block row
stride.control_or_reason: mandatory Privacy controls sub-row: pseudonymise + mask + minimise + DPIA trigger by class

stride.component: v4 Measurement Contract section / Contract Block row
stride.control_or_reason: Evidence Log + Results-vs-thesis record who/what/when for ship decisions
read-only heuristic checks, no network, no writes (same shape as Pass 4)
bounded heuristic scan over a bounded file set
user-provided strings wrapped in ~~~text fences in any generated SECURITY/threat-model output (existing SLO rule)
generated text renders to descriptive Markdown only; never selects control fields (id/status/classification)
SHA baseline change is explicit and PR-reviewed; never waived

abuse_cases.attack_step: Paste a crafted string into a success-thesis or feature-spec field containing Markdown/YAML/HTML metacharacters to break out of the section or smuggle agent-readable instructions into a generated SECURITY/threat-model artifact
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: Template-placeholder injection altering security defaults or injecting instructions
abuse_cases.control: All user-provided strings rendered into generated security/threat artifacts wrapped in ~~~text fences (reuse of the load-bearing /slo-architect fence rule); measurement sections render user text as plain Markdown body only and never select control fields

abuse_cases.surface: Generated measurement contract telemetry guidance + docs/biz-public/ artifacts
abuse_cases.attack_step: Generated contract drives collection of raw identifiers / unmasked PII into analytics, or a feature spec quotes a real customer, and lands under git-tracked docs/biz-public/
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: PII leak to a public remote; PECR/GDPR breach
abuse_cases.control: Mandatory Privacy controls row (pseudonymised event ids by default, masking, minimisation, consent for non-essential cookies, DPIA trigger); /slo-verify measurement pass extends Pass 4 PII scan to telemetry field definitions; pii_scan_override + reason required for intentional matches

abuse_cases.attack_step: Set feature_measurement_spec: true or check the Measurement Contract box without an actual spec/telemetry
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: False 'measured' signal; ship-decision made on absent telemetry
abuse_cases.control: /slo-verify measurement pass cross-checks the flag against actual presence of the spec section and the failure-path emission check; /slo-retro Results-vs-thesis refuses on blank actuals (existing rule)

residual_risks.risk: Author can hand-author a thin or dishonest measurement contract
residual_risks.exploit_path: Framework forces the shape and cross-checks, not the team's integrity; a determined author can still fake a thin contract
residual_risks.compensating_control: /slo-verify + /slo-retro raise the cost of faking; mitigation not elimination (tm-measurement-loop-abuse-3)

residual_risks.risk: This work generates guidance; it does not enforce the target product's runtime privacy
residual_risks.exploit_path: SLO ships no telemetry runtime; a target product could ignore the recommended defaults
residual_risks.compensating_control: Contract makes safe defaults the path of least resistance; direct-marketing/cookie questions routed to /slo-legal triage (PECR) per existing biz-pack wiring. Disclosed, not eliminated.

compliance.control: Telemetry PII minimisation + pseudonymisation by default

compliance.gdpr: PECR reg. 6 active consent; strictly-necessary exemption only
DPIA where high risk (innovative tech, behaviour/geolocation tracking); living process feeding the plan
Default masking of inputs/numbers/emails; unmasking only as explicit justified action
